playerBasicInfo.invitedTooltip: The player is already invited to your team.

signingIn.title: Completing sign-in...

pastMatches.emptyState: No past match to show at the moment

transferNews.title: Transfer News
transferNews.emptyState: No transfer news is scheduled at the moment

templates.playerInvited: {firstName} invites you to join {teamName}. Contact number: {phoneNumber}
templates.playerApplied: {firstName} applied to join to your team. Contact number: {phoneNumber}
templates.playerRemoved: You were removed from team {teamName} by its captain.
templates.playerPromoted: You were promoted to team captain of {teamName}
templates.playerShirtNumberChanged: Your shirt number changed from {oldNumber} to {newNumber}
templates.teamCreationApproved: Your team creation is approved. Good Luck.
templates.teamCreationRejected: Your team creation is rejected for the following reason: {rejectionReason}
templates.profilePictureRejected: Your profile picture is rejected for the following reason: {rejectionReason}.
templates.playerRespondedToInvitation: {firstName} {response} your invitation to join to your team.

flow.acceptInvitationDescription: Are you sure you want to accept this invitation? You will be transferred to {teamName} immediately.
flow.acceptApplicationDescription: Are you sure you want to accept this application? {firstName} {lastName} will be transferred to your team immediately.
flow.declineInvitationDescription: Are you sure you want to decline this invitation? This action cannot be undone.
flow.declineApplicationDescription: Are you sure you want to decline this application? This action cannot be undone.
flow.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

teams.title: Teams
teams.failedToLoad: Failed to load teams. Please try again.
teams.empty: No teams to show at the moment.
teams.cannotCreateCaptain: You are already the captain of {teamName}. Transfer the captain role and quit if you want to create a new team.
teams.cannotCreateDraft: You already created a team, which is under review. You will be notified once we review it.
teams.cannotCreateInTeam: You are already in {teamName}. Quit if you want to create a new team.
teams.appliedTooltip: You already applied to this team.

transferHistory.label: Transfers of the player during the career
transferHistory.emptyStateText: No transfer news is scheduled at the moment

pastMatches.label: Player's matches with highlights associated with him
pastMatches.emptyStateText: No past match to show at the moment.

unassigned.title: Free Agent
unassigned.label: Player is not assigned to any team at this moment.

playerInvitationCard.title: Player Invitation
playerInvitationCard.label: Invite {playerName} to your team? Your phone number will be visible to the player for contact.

modals.mustBeCaptain: You must be a captain to send invitations.
modals.invitationSentDescription: The player has been invited to your team.
modals.makeCaptainDescription: Are you sure you want to make {firstName} {lastName} the team captain? You will lose your captain privileges.
modals.captainChangedDescription: The team captain has been updated.
modals.removeMemberDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {firstName} {lastName} from the team?
modals.memberRemovedDescription: The team member has been removed.
modals.quitTeamDescription: Are you sure you want to quit the team?

errors.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.notFound: Oops! This page went out of bounds! ⚽
errors.accessDenied: Access Denied. You don't have permission to view this content.
errors.notAllowedDescription: You are not allowed to perform this action

teamForm.logoTypeError: Only PNG, JPG, or JPEG files are allowed.
teamForm.cropError: Failed to crop image. Please try again.
teamForm.teamNameMinLength: Team name must be at least 5 characters.
teamForm.teamNameMaxLength: Team name must not exceed 24 characters.
teamForm.teamNameLatinOnly: Team name must contain only Latin letters.
teamForm.abbreviationPattern: Abbreviation must contain exactly 3 Latin letters.

createTeam.title: Create Team
createTeam.subtitle: Your winning journey starts here!
createTeam.failedToCreate: Failed to create team. Please try again.
createTeam.successDescription: Your team has been created successfully!
createTeam.incompleteProfileDesc: This player is unable to receive an invite due to an incomplete profile.

updateTeam.title: Update Team
updateTeam.subtitle: Edit your team details
updateTeam.failedToUpdate: Failed to update team. Please try again.
updateTeam.successDescription: Your team has been updated successfully!

updateDraftTeam.title: Update Draft Team

updateDraftTeam.failedToUpdate: Failed to update team. Please try again.
updateDraftTeam.successDescription: Your draft team has been updated successfully!

draftTeam.underReview: No data available yet — your team is still under review.
draftTeam.deleteDraftDescription: Are you sure you want to delete your draft team? This action cannot be undone.
draftTeam.deleteSuccessDescription: Your draft team has been successfully deleted.
draftTeam.statusPending: This team is under review and will be published once approved.
draftTeam.statusRejected: This team was rejected during review. Please update the information and resubmit.
